R19.query: How does the notification system work? Trace from WebSocket event to desktop/browser notification.

R20.query: Find all React context providers and what state they share across the component tree.

R21.query: How does channel switching work? What happens when a user clicks a channel in the sidebar?

R22.query: Find all file upload handling — from drag-and-drop to API submission.

R23.query: How is search implemented? Trace from the search input to displaying results.

R24.query: Find all permission checks in the frontend — how does the app determine what a user can do?

R25.query: How does the emoji system work? Custom emoji, picker, reactions — trace the full implementation.

R26.query: Find all uses of localStorage and sessionStorage. What data is persisted client-side?

R27.query: How does the drafts system work? Auto-saving, restoring when switching channels, draft indicators.
